ThingDef.Name: KT_Bow_Great
ThingDef.label: Super greatbow
ThingDef.description: A super greatbow. Fires a heavy arrow long distances.

ThingDef.Name: KT_SKGUN
ThingDef.label: "Star Defender" Psycho-Laser Rifle
ThingDef.description: A Psycho-Warrior exclusive weapon of immense power, though it can only emit pink laser beams.\n\nEveryone expects lasers to be green, but there's nothing wrong with pink...

ThingDef.Name: KT_Rumbler
ThingDef.label: "Thunderer" M-26 Mortar
ThingDef.description: This portable mortar represents the absolute limit of lightweight design. It utilizes a unique magazine feed system, capable of firing three 80mm mortar shells in rapid succession for devastating bombardment. Additionally, its explosions release large quantities of toxic gas.

ThingDef.Name: KT_Analnail
ThingDef.label: Dainsleif
ThingDef.description: An ancient model kinetic launcher, rumored to be so slow that only third-rate Dragoon pilots or Mililas with eight broken wing segments could fail to dodge it, and it comes with only one round of ammunition. After traveling a certain distance, the projectile will penetrate through the first unit it hits as well as any units behind it, so aim at the frontmost unit for maximum penetration effect. Can shoot over walls 45° No-Escape Zone (projectile hit correction) Knockback effect

ThingDef.label: "Slaughterer" CS-1 Chainsword
ThingDef.description: This massive chainsword is equipped with monomolecular teeth that can easily shred heavy armor. The wielder can choose between wide-area slashing or brutal focused attacks on single targets. Blood for the T-Du! Skulls for the Throne of Virtue! Currently in single-target output mode: higher armor penetration and extremely high attack frequency Attacks with EMP effects

ThingDef.label: "Slaughterer" CS-1 Chainsword（AOE）
ThingDef.description: This massive chainsword is equipped with monomolecular teeth that can easily shred heavy armor. The wielder can choose between wide-area slashing or brutal focused attacks on single targets. Blood for the T-Du! Skulls for the Throne of Virtue! Currently in cleave mode: AOE melee attacks Attacks with EMP effects
